spec.title: Hunt: veal parm in capital district
spec.intent: Create a high-quality Mosaic map for "veal parm in capital district" using current, verifiable, place-specific evidence before any public data promotion.
spec.scope: Research the topic broadly enough to produce a useful first review batch while respecting the quality gates.
mustHaveConstraints: Exact street-level address for every candidate
Current or recent evidence of relevance
Verified real photos tied to the actual place and map intent
exclusions: Stock photos, generic storefronts, parking lots, or unrelated visuals
Closed, stale, or weakly evidenced places
Generic chains or filler unless explicitly requested and justified
spec.photoPolicy: Use only real, location-tied photos that visibly show the thing the map is about. Keep unresolved photo work in review artifacts, not public entries.json.
qualityTargets: Research artifacts first; no raw candidate may write directly to public/data/maps
Promotion requires exact address, valid coordinates, recent evidence, and verified real photos
Rejected candidates must keep a rejection reason for review

sourceIssue.title: Hunt: veal parm in capital district

qualityGates.description: Every promoted candidate must have a full street-level address.
Coordinates must be numeric, match the street address, and stay inside declared bounds when present.
Evidence must show the place is current or recently corroborated.
Generic chains, stale places, and weak filler stay rejected unless explicitly justified.
Public promotion requires real, location-tied photos that match the Hunt intent.
